title: Vežba 10

fillInTheBlank.sentence: I know, but I'm wondering if there's anything we could do to speed things up. Maybe BLANK some tasks BLANK or BLANK the most important ones?

blanks.feedback: U vezi sa rečju around, ovaj glagol znači menjati poziciju nečega.
Za glagol to move, ova reč znači promeniti raspored ili poziciju stvari.
Ovaj princip znači da se prvo fokusira na najvažnije stvari.

dialogue.text: I know, but I'm wondering if there's anything we could do to speed things up.
Maybe move some tasks around or prioritize the most important ones?

instructions: Poslušaj zvuk i dovrši rečenicu ispod.
explanation:
To move something around to znači menjanje rasporeda ili pozicije stavki. Na primer:

We need to move some meetings around to fit the new schedule. - To znači da se sastanci mogu ponovo rasporediti na drugačija vremena.

To prioritize to znači fokusirati se na najvažnije zadatke prvo. Na primer:

Let's prioritize fixing the critical bugs before adding new features. - Ovo znači raditi na hitnim problemima pre svega drugog.
